nasb.text: and has not brought it to the doorway of the tent of meeting to present it as an offering to the Lord before the tabernacle of the Lord, bloodguiltiness is to be reckoned to that man. He has shed blood and that man shall be cut off from among his people.

esv.text: and does not bring it to the entrance of the tent of meeting to offer it as a gift to the Lord in front of the tabernacle of the Lord, bloodguilt shall be imputed to that man. He has shed blood, and that man shall be cut off from among his people.

cnv.text: 而不牽到會幕門口，耶和華的帳幕面前，獻給耶和華作供物，流血的罪就要歸到那人身上；他既然流了牲畜的血，就必從自己的族人中被剪除。

ccb.text: 若没有把牲畜带到会幕门口，在耶和华的圣幕前献给耶和华，便是犯了流血之罪，要将他从民中铲除。
